title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. iberica
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. iberica, also known as the Iberian Gymnadenia, is a rare and lesser-known orchid subspecies native to the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Iberian Gymnadenia is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
